Part.Source:
loadWWPContext.Call(&Context) If &Context.PesCod = 0 Return EndIf &pescod = &Context.PesCod &PesRaz = &Context.PesRaz For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &Context.FilCod &FilFan = FilFan Exit EndFor
MB 4 MT 2
Header &titulo = 'ANÁLISE DE RESULTADO' print Cabecalho End
if &FilCod = 0 &sdtFilialAcesso = DpFilialAcesso.Udp(&Context.EmPCod, &Context.PesCod)
for &sdtFilialAcessoitem in &sdtFilialAcesso &AuxFiLCod.Add(&sdtFilialAcessoitem.PesFilAce) Endfor Else &AuxFiLCod.Add(&FilCod) Endif
//###################################### SALDO ATUAL ########################################## &SdoAnt = 0 &SdoAtu = 0 For Each Order EmpCod,CtaBanFilCod,CtabanCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where CtaBanFilCod in &AuxFiLCod
For Each Order EmpCod,CtabanCod,(SdoDta) Where SdoDta < &DtaIni &SdoAtu += SdoAtu exit EndFor EndFor &SdoAnt = &SdoAtu //####################################### IMPRIMIR FILIAL E SALDO ############################# &TotCre = 0 &TotDeb = 0 For Each Order EmpCod,FilCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod &FilRaz = FilFan Exit When none &FilRaz = '0-TODAS AS FILIAIS' EndFor
Print Filial
If &GrpTip.IsEmpty() and &PlaCod.IsEmpty() Noskip Print SaldoInicial EndIf &auxPlanHie = &PlanHie.Trim() + '.' If &IsSintetico = False //######################################## PLANO - CATEGORIA - MOVIMENTO ANALÍTICO ####################### For each order EmpCod, MovCtaBanFilCod, PlanUtiTra, PlanHie, MovDtaCon Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where MovCtaBanFilCod in &AuxFiLCod Where PlanUtiTra = false Where (PlanHie like &auxPlanHie or PlanHie = &PlanHie) When not &PlanHie.IsEmpty() Where PlanCatTip = &GrpTip when not &GrpTip.IsEmpty() Where MovDtaCon >= &DtaIni and MovDtaCon <= &DtaFin Where MovItmSts <> Status_Caixa.Cancelado or MovItmSts.IsEmpty() or MovItmSts.IsNull() Where MovSts <> Status_Caixa.Cancelado or MovSts.IsNull() or MovSts.IsEmpty()
&LayPlaNom = trim(MovItmCpl)
If PlanHie <> &AuxPlanHie If not &AuxPlanHie.IsEmpty() Print TotalPlano &TotPla = 0 EndIf
Print Plano print TituloCategoria EndIf &AuxPlanHie = PlanHie &AuxMovItmVlr = MovItmVlr
If PlanCatTip = 'C' // Crédito &TotPla += &AuxMovItmVlr &TotPlaCat += &AuxMovItmVlr &ResFin += &AuxMovItmVlr &TotCre += &AuxMovItmVlr &MovItmVlr = &AuxMovItmVlr Else &TotPla -= &AuxMovItmVlr &TotPlaCat -= &AuxMovItmVlr &ResFin -= &AuxMovItmVlr &TotDeb -= &AuxMovItmVlr &MovItmVlr = &AuxMovItmVlr *(-1) EndIf
&MovItmCpl = MovItmCpl &MovCreCod = MovCreCod &MovCreFilCod = MovCreFilCod
Do 'NumeroDuplicata'
Print Movimento EndFor
// If &TotPla 0 Print TotalPlano // Final Relatório
&ResSdoAnt = 0 &ResSdoAnt = &SdoAnt + &TotCre + &TotDeb
Print Resumo Else //######################################## PLANO - CATEGORIA - MOVIMENTO SINTÉTICO ####################### For each order EmpCod,MovCtaBanFilCod,PlanHie Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where MovCtaBanFilCod in &AuxFiLCod Where PlanUtiTra = false Where (PlanHie like &auxPlanHie or PlanHie = &PlanHie) When not &PlanHie.IsEmpty() Where PlanCatTip = &GrpTip when not &GrpTip.IsEmpty() Where MovDtaCon >= &DtaIni and MovDtaCon <= &DtaFin Where MovItmSts <> Status_Caixa.Cancelado or MovItmSts.IsEmpty() or MovItmSts.IsNull() Where MovSts <> Status_Caixa.Cancelado or MovSts.IsNull() or MovSts.IsEmpty()
If PlanHie <> &AuxPlanHie If not &AuxPlanHie.IsEmpty() Print CategoriaSintetico &MovItmVlr = 0 EndIf EndIf
&AuxPlanHie = PlanHie
&LayPlaCatCod = PlanHie &LayPlaCatNom = PlanNomCmp &LayPlaCatTip = PlanCatTip
&AuxMovItmVlr = MovItmVlr If PlanCatTip = 'C' // Crédito &TotPla += &AuxMovItmVlr &TotPlaCat += &AuxMovItmVlr &ResFin += &AuxMovItmVlr &TotCre += &AuxMovItmVlr &MovItmVlr += &AuxMovItmVlr Else &TotPla -= &AuxMovItmVlr &TotPlaCat -= &AuxMovItmVlr &ResFin -= &AuxMovItmVlr &TotDeb -= &AuxMovItmVlr &MovItmVlr += &AuxMovItmVlr * (-1) EndIf EndFor
if &MovItmVlr <> 0 Print CategoriaSintetico EndIF
// Print TotalPlano // Final Relatório
&ResSdoAnt = 0 &ResSdoAnt = &SdoAnt + &TotCre + &TotDeb Print Resumo EndIf
//////############################################ SALDO DAS CONTAS ####################################### Print SaldoCapa
For each Order EmpCod,CtaBanSts Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CtaBanFilCod in &AuxFiLCod Where CtaBanSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO &CtabanCod = CtabanCod &CtaBanCodNom = CtaBanCodNom
If &Context.PesCod > 0 Do 'ValidaPermisaoConta' Else &IsAutorizado = True EndIf If &IsAutorizado = True For each Order EmpCod,CtabanCod,(SdoDta) Where SdoDta <= &DtaFin &SdoDta = SdoDta &SdoSdoAtu = SdoAtu &TotSdoAtu += SdoAtu Exit When none &SdoDta = &DtaFin &SdoSdoAtu = 0 EndFor Print SaldoContas EndIf EndFor
Print TotalContas
//########################################### FOOTER ################################################## Footer print Rodape End
Sub 'NumeroDuplicata' &CreDupNro = '' For Each Order EmpCod,CreCod,FilCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CreCod = &MovCreCod Where FilCod = &MovCreFilCod &CreDupNro = CreDupNro Exit EndFor EndSub
Sub 'ValidaPermisaoConta' &IsAutorizado = False For each Order EmpCod,CtabanCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CtabanCod = &CtaBanCod Where CtaFunCod = &Context.PesCod &IsAutorizado = True exit EndFor EndSub

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: Respeite o meio ambiente. Evite a impressão deste documento!
